text: Ah! I see the issue. In the sample data, the status appears as lowercase "unresolved" not uppercase "UNRESOLVED". Let me check what distinct status values exist.
Perfect! So the status values are lowercase. Now let me query for unresolved issues in the billing project with the correct case.

text: Great! Now I have the list of IDs. Let me also count them to provide the exact number.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM sentry_issues WHERE project = 'billing' AND status = 'unresolved'"}
